mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.user_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, u.user_name) as buyer_name, o.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, o.status as order_status, o.total_amount, o.item_count, o.del_flag, o.pay_time, o.carrier, o.tracking_no, o.ship_time, o.receive_time, o.cancel_time, o.create_time, o.update_time from shop_order o inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = o.merchant_id inner join shop_user u on u.user_id = o.user_id
mapper.select: select address_id, user_id, recipient, phone, province_code, city_code, district_code, detail_address from shop_user_address where user_id = #{userId} and address_id = #{addressId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select p.product_id, p.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, p.category_id, c.category_code, c.category_name, p.product_name, p.cover_url, p.price, p.stock, p.status as product_status from shop_product p inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = p.merchant_id inner join shop_product_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.status = 'ON_SALE' and p.del_flag = '0' and m.audit_status = 'APPROVED' and m.status = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' for update
select count(1) from shop_verification_report where report_id = #{reportId} and product_id = #{productId} and status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.update: update shop_product set stock = stock - #{quantity}, update_time = sysdate() where product_id = #{productId} and status = 'ON_SALE' and del_flag = '0' and stock >= #{quantity}
update shop_product set stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = sysdate() where product_id = #{productId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_order (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, status, total_amount, item_count, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{itemCount}, '0', sysdate(), sysdate())

insert into shop_order_item (order_id, product_id, source_report_id, product_name, cover_url, unit_price, quantity, line_amount, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{sourceReportId}, #{productName}, #{coverUrl}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{lineAmount}, sysdate())

insert into shop_order_address (order_id, recipient, phone, province_code, city_code, district_code, detail_address, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{recipient}, #{phone}, #{provinceCode}, #{cityCode}, #{districtCode}, #{detail}, sysdate())

insert into shop_order_status_log (order_id, from_status, to_status, operator_type, operator_id, remark, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{remark}, sysdate())

insert into shop_order_logistics_event (order_id, event_code, description, location, event_time, source, source_event_id, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{eventCode}, #{description}, #{location}, sysdate(), #{source}, #{sourceEventId}, sysdate())
mapper.select: where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.del_flag = '0' order by o.order_id desc
where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1
where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update

select oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.source_report_id, published.report_id as verification_report_id, oi.product_name, oi.cover_url, oi.unit_price, oi.quantity, oi.line_amount, oi.create_time from shop_order_item oi left join shop_verification_report published on published.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id and published.status = 'PUBLISHED' where oi.order_id = #{orderId} order by oi.order_item_id

select oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.source_report_id, published.report_id as verification_report_id, oi.product_name, oi.cover_url, oi.unit_price, oi.quantity, oi.line_amount, oi.create_time from shop_order_item oi inner join shop_order o on o.order_id = oi.order_id left join shop_verification_report published on published.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id and published.status = 'PUBLISHED' where o.user_id = #{userId} and oi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId} and o.status = 'RECEIVED' and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update
select order_address_id, order_id, recipient, phone, province_code, city_code, district_code, detail_address from shop_order_address where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1

select event_id, order_id, event_code, description, location, event_time, source, source_event_id, create_time from shop_order_logistics_event where order_id = #{orderId} order by event_time desc, event_id desc
mapper.update: update shop_order set status = #{toStatus}, pay_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'PAID' then sysdate() else pay_time end, receive_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'RECEIVED' then sysdate() else receive_time end, cancel_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'CANCELLED' then sysdate() else cancel_time end, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and order_id = #{orderId} and status = #{fromStatus} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: where o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and o.del_flag = '0' order by o.order_id desc
where o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1
where o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update
where o.del_flag = '0' order by o.order_id desc
mapper.update: update shop_order set status = 'SHIPPED', carrier = #{carrier}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, ship_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where merchant_id = #{merchantId} and order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'PAID' and del_flag = '0'
